SEARCH
程序包 mypakege

类 Date

java.lang.Object
tuition.Date
所有已实现的接口:
Comparable<Date>
public class Date extends Object implements Comparable<Date>
A simple Date class in mm/dd/yyyy format used by the registration system. Provides validation, comparison, equality, and string representation.
作者:
HIrotaku Hayashi hh635, junjie Xia jx309

  • 字段概要

    字段
    修饰符和类型
    字段
    说明

    day
     
    private int
    month
     
    private int
    year
     

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    Date(String mmddyyyy)
    Constructs a Date object from a string in "mm/dd/yyyy" format.

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    int
    compareTo(Date o)
    Compares this date with another date chronologically.
    boolean
    equals(Object obj)
    Checks equality between this Date and another object.
    int
    getDay()
    Returns the day value.
    int
    getMonth()
    Returns the month value.
    int
    getYear()
    Returns the year value.

    isLeapYear(int y)
    Determines whether the given year is a leap year.

    isTodayOrFuture()
    Checks whether this date is today or a future date.
    boolean

    Checks whether this date is a valid calendar date.
    static void
    main(String[] args)
    Testbed main() for unit testing Date.isValid() as required by the project.
    String
    toString()
    Returns the string representation of this date in "m/d/yyyy" format.

  • 字段详细资料

    • year

      private int year

    • month

      private int month

    • day

      private int day

  • 构造器详细资料

    • Date

      public Date(String mmddyyyy)
      Constructs a Date object from a string in "mm/dd/yyyy" format.
      参数:
      mmddyyyy - the date string in "mm/dd/yyyy" format

  • 方法详细资料

    • getYear

      public int getYear()
      Returns the year value.
      返回:
      the year

    • getMonth

      public int getMonth()
      Returns the month value.
      返回:
      the month (1-12)

    • getDay

      public int getDay()
      Returns the day value.
      返回:
      the day of month

    • isValid

      public boolean isValid()
      Checks whether this date is a valid calendar date. This method verifies month range, day range, and leap-year rules for February.
      返回:
      true if the date is a valid calendar date; otherwise false

    • isLeapYear

      private boolean isLeapYear(int y)
      Determines whether the given year is a leap year.
      参数:
      y - the year to check
      返回:
      true if y is a leap year; otherwise false

    • isTodayOrFuture

      public boolean isTodayOrFuture()
      Checks whether this date is today or a future date. Used to enforce the rule that DOB cannot be today or in the future.
      返回:
      true if this date is today or later; otherwise false

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(Date o)
      Compares this date with another date chronologically.
      指定者:
      compareTo 在接口中 Comparable<Date>
      参数:
      o - the other Date to compare with
      返回:
      a negative integer if this date is earlier than o; zero if equal; a positive integer if this date is later than o

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Checks equality between this Date and another object. Two dates are equal if they have the same year, month, and day.
      覆盖:
      equals 在类中 Object
      参数:
      obj - the object to compare
      返回:
      true if obj is a Date with the same y/m/d; otherwise false

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns the string representation of this date in "m/d/yyyy" format.
      覆盖:
      toString 在类中 Object
      返回:
      the formatted date string

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      Testbed main() for unit testing Date.isValid() as required by the project. Includes 4 invalid and 2 valid test cases.
      参数:
      args - command-line arguments (not used)
